title: Contract Senior Associate Media Planner
description: To obtain a mid-level leadership position in media that will utilize my strong analytical, negotiation and creative-thinking skills.
experience: Experienced in media planning and buying, involved in all aspects from client briefing to post-buy reporting. Skilled in creating strategic and tactical media recommendations, negotiating costs, securing placements, and analyzing campaign performance. Proficient in managing client relationships, coordinating with multiple departments, and overseeing project timelines for various digital and traditional media campaigns. Background also includes sales planning, studio management, and marketing coordination, with a focus on data analysis, vendor management, and financial reconciliation.
